name: centralized_service_margin
description: Compute cost-plus margin for a centralized service. Given the fee a property pays and the markup percentage, derives the vendor cost, gross profit, and effective margin. Markup means: vendor cost × (1 + markup) = property fee.

serviceRevenue.description: The fee amount the property pays for this service (company's revenue)

markup.description: Cost-plus markup as decimal (e.g., 0.20 = 20%). If company buys for $1 and markup is 0.20, property pays $1.20

vendorCost.description: What the company pays the vendor = serviceRevenue / (1 + markup)

effectiveMargin.description: Profit as % of revenue = markup / (1 + markup)
